expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子用木板的尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度]是总尺寸，[板材厚度]是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度]是背景板的材料厚度。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นด้านบน, ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาวัสดุของแผ่นด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu tấm trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu tấm phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng mga tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay ang kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibaba at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဘိန်အတွက်ဝက်အရွယ်အစားများကင်းရှင်းသတ်မှတ်ပါ။ [Width],[ယူရောင်း],[ကိုယ်ပိုင်]ယားသံ,
